result.stdout:
Description:
  NuGet helper tool

Usage:
  NuGetHelper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  clean    Remove unused PackageVersion definitions by using `dotnet nuget why` to audit usages
  upgrade  Upgrade all NuGet packages (csproj or CPM), including transitive pinned versions

commands.payload:
Description:
  NuGet helper tool

Usage:
  NuGetHelper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  clean    Remove unused PackageVersion definitions by using `dotnet nuget why` to audit usages
  upgrade  Upgrade all NuGet packages (csproj or CPM), including transitive pinned versions

result.stdout:
Description:
  Remove unused PackageVersion definitions by using `dotnet nuget why` to audit usages

Usage:
  NuGetHelper clean [options]

Options:
  -d, --dry-run   Only print the unused PackageVersion definitions
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Remove unused PackageVersion definitions by using `dotnet nuget why` to audit usages

Usage:
  NuGetHelper clean [options]

Options:
  -d, --dry-run   Only print the unused PackageVersion definitions
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Upgrade all NuGet packages (csproj or CPM), including transitive pinned versions

Usage:
  NuGetHelper upgrade [options]

Options:
  --path <path>          Path to project or Directory.Packages.props file [default: ./Directory.Packages.props]
  --suppress             [default: True]
  --stable               [default: True]
  --dry-run              [default: False]
  --parallel <parallel>  [default: 5]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Upgrade all NuGet packages (csproj or CPM), including transitive pinned versions

Usage:
  NuGetHelper upgrade [options]

Options:
  --path <path>          Path to project or Directory.Packages.props file [default: ./Directory.Packages.props]
  --suppress             [default: True]
  --stable               [default: True]
  --dry-run              [default: False]
  --parallel <parallel>  [default: 5]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
